title: BUILT TO RUN.
NOT TO PITCH.
hero.intro: Products that generate revenue. Not decks. Not demos. Revenue.

cta.title: READY WHEN IT NEEDS TO SHIP.

sections.title: CUSTOM DEVELOPMENT.
sections.body: We build custom products, internal tools, and platform work. Infrastructure, pipelines, integrations. Whatever the problem demands — from concept to live. We've operated across prediction systems, voice platforms, industrial tools. Past work under NDA.

sections.title: FAST. REAL. MINIMAL.
sections.body: You tell us the problem. We tell you if we can solve it and what it costs. That's it.
